head_commit.message: Fix TDX OSDK run tests for newly created kernel projects
Make rootfs display the correct fs_type

Remove remaining manually-written log prefixes

Remove bracket-style prefixes ([IOAPIC], [sys_getpid], [Task entry],
etc.) and text prefixes that duplicate what __log_prefix already
provides (VirtIO Input:, IOMMU, PCI device, etc.) across kernel
syscalls, virtio, PCI, IOMMU, and IRQ subsystems.
